components.name: AppLayout
components.description: Page frame with collapsible navigation, tools, and content regions.

props.name: ariaLabels
props.type: { navigation?: string; navigationClose?: string; navigationToggle?: string; tools?: string; toolsClose?: string; toolsToggle?: string; }

components.name: ContentLayout
components.description: Header band sitting above the main content area.

components.name: Container
components.description: A bordered surface that groups related content under a header.

props.name: media
props.type: { content?: import('svelte').Snippet | string; position?: 'top' | 'side'; height?: string; width?: string; }

components.name: Grid
components.description: Twelve-column responsive grid for arranging content.

props.type: Array<{ colspan?: number; offset?: number; push?: number; pull?: number }>

props.name: columns
props.type: Array<{ colspan?: number; offset?: number; push?: number; pull?: number; content: import('svelte').Snippet; }>

components.name: ColumnLayout
components.description: Evenly sized columns with optional dividers.

components.name: SpaceBetween
components.description: Consistent spacing between stacked or inline children.

components.name: Box
components.description: Low-level primitive for spacing, color, and typography.

components.name: SplitPanel
components.description: A panel that docks to the bottom or side of the app shell.

components.name: Divider
components.description: A thin horizontal rule between sections.

components.name: SideNavigation
components.description: Vertical navigation list with sections, links, and groups.

props.type: { text: string; href: string; logo?: { src: string; alt?: string } }

props.name: onChange
props.type: (e: { detail: { item: Item; expanded: boolean } }) => void

components.name: TopNavigation
components.description: Global top bar with title, search, and utility menus.

props.name: i18nStrings
props.type: { searchIconAriaLabel?: string; searchDismissIconAriaLabel?: string; overflowMenuTriggerText?: string; overflowMenuTitleText?: string; overflowMenuBackIconAriaLabel?: string; overflowMenuDismissIconAriaLabel?: string; }

props.type: (e: { detail: { item: Item; text: string; href: string } }) => void

components.name: Tabs

props.type: (e: { detail: { requestedPageAvailable: boolean; requestedPageIndex: number } }) => void
